FALLBACK.MESSAGE_TITLE: Sorry, something went wrong with this application
FALLBACK.MESSAGE_FEEDBACK: Our team has been notified. If you would like to help, please, tell us what happened below.

TRAIL_MAKING.WELCOME_MESSAGE: Welcome. This test helps us understand how your brain works. Please read each instruction carefully before you begin.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE1_INTRO: We will start with the instructions and a short training. Read and listen carefully, you do not have to do anything yet. You can see circles with numbers from 1 to 8. Your goal is to connect all numbers in the correct numerical order. The starting point is marked at 1 (Start) and the ending point at 8 (End). Connect 1 to 2, 2 to 3, and so on until number 8 (End). A line will be drawn between circles as you connect them. Important: If you make a mistake, click the last circle again to reset it, then continue with the correct sequence. Work as quickly and accurately as possible. Ready? Go ahead and try. This is a training before we start the actual test.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE1_REVIEW_BUTTON: Click here to review the instructions
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE1_RETRY_MESSAGE: OK! Don't worry, we'll repeat the training once more.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE1_PROCEED_MESSAGE: OK! Now you'll perform the actual test.
TRAIL_MAKING.TASK1_READY_MESSAGE: You now see numbers from 1 to 25. The starting point is marked at 1 (Start) and the ending point at 25 (End). Just like during the training, connect the numbers in ascending order until number 25 (End). Work as quickly and accurately as possible. The time needed to complete the test will be measured. Important: If you make a mistake, click the last circle again to reset it, then continue with the correct sequence. Are you ready? Go ahead.
TRAIL_MAKING.TASK1_COMPLETE_MESSAGE: Thank you, this part of the test is finished. We will now move on to the second part.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE2_INTRO: This part is slightly different. We will start with a short training. Read and listen carefully, you do not have to do anything yet. You now see circles with numbers and letters. Your goal is to connect one number with one letter by following both numerical and alphabetical order. The starting point is marked at 1 (Start) and the ending point at D (End). Click on 1 (Start), then A, then 2, then B, and continue in the same pattern until the end. A line will be drawn between circles as you connect them. Remember to alternate one number with one letter. Important: If you make a mistake, click the last circle again to reset it, then continue with the correct sequence. Work as quickly and accurately as possible. Ready? Go ahead and try. This is a training.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE2_REVIEW_BUTTON: Click here to review the instructions
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE2_RETRY_MESSAGE: OK! Don't worry, we'll repeat the training once more.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE2_PROCEED_MESSAGE: OK! Now you'll perform the actual test.
TRAIL_MAKING.TASK2_READY_MESSAGE: You now see numbers and letters scattered on the screen. The starting point is marked at 1 (Start) and the ending point at 13 (End). Just like during the training, connect first a number, then a letter, in increasing numerical and alphabetical order until the end. Click 1 (Start), then A, then 2, then B, and continue in the same pattern. A line will be drawn between circles as you connect them. Important: If you make a mistake, click the last circle again to reset it, then continue with the correct sequence. Work as quickly and accurately as possible. The time needed to complete the test will be measured. Ready? Go ahead.
TRAIL_MAKING.TASK2_COMPLETE_MESSAGE: OK, thank you, the test is now complete.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE_TRIAL_ERROR: There is a mistake in your sequence.
TRAIL_MAKING.PRACTICE_TRIAL_RETRY_PROMPT: Do you want to retry this practice trial?

SETTINGS.CIRCLE_RADIUS_HELP: Size of the circles containing numbers/letters (15-50 pixels)
SETTINGS.TRAIL_MAKING_NOTE: Note: Custom layouts for each stage can be configured in advanced settings.
SETTINGS.CONGRUENT_PERCENTAGE_HELP: Percentage of trials where flankers match the center arrow
SETTINGS.INCONGRUENT_PERCENTAGE_HELP: Percentage of trials where flankers are opposite to the center arrow
SETTINGS.NEUTRAL_PERCENTAGE_HELP: Percentage of trials where flankers are dashes (remaining after congruent + incongruent)
SETTINGS.ITI_HELP: Blank time between stimulus offset and next trial (500-5000 ms)
SETTINGS.SHOW_FIXATION_CROSS: Show fixation cross during inter-trial interval
SETTINGS.DISPLAY_DURATION_HELP: How long each number is shown (100-2000 ms)
SETTINGS.CUSTOM_PRACTICE_SEQUENCE_HELP: Leave empty for random sequence. Enter comma-separated digits (0-9): 3,5,2,5,7,8,5,...
SETTINGS.CUSTOM_SEQUENCE_HELP: Leave empty for random sequence. Enter comma-separated digits (0-9): 3,5,2,5,7,8,5,...
